subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! The cradle of tranquility is adorned, and the honey of inner meanings floweth from the spiritual mouth. The feast is resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی مهد آسایش آراسته و شهد معانی از فم روحانی ریزش مینماید بزم رنگین است
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
